verdicts.note: Direction and magnitude are right (voted to tax millionaires — pole_b verbatim), but the evidence is one self-reported pamphlet claim [S1], uncorroborated by the legislative-record sources S3/S4. That is a single clear statement, which the guide defines as medium, not high.

Her statement is about corruption and theft of taxpayer funds, not tax policy. Reading 'rising taxes are a harm' as a limit-and-cut-taxes agenda is indirect inference from a pamphlet-only file; low, not medium. (Her KC GOP platform alignment cannot be used — that would be party-preference smuggling.)

Direction is certain, but 'high' rests on one pamphlet phrase ('sacredness of life') plus a professional-association office held 1988-1992, in a pamphlet-only file. A single current statement corroborated by a 35-year-old role is medium, not high.
